AI_Brief: The Avellon Geopolitical Risk Index (AGRI) score of 62.4 reflects a significantly elevated risk environment, primarily driven by severe disruptions in Energy & Maritime sectors and intensifying Geopolitical Conflicts. The 'Iran war triggered 'most severe oil supply shock in history,' according to the IEA, directly contributing to the maximum score in Energy & Maritime Disruption. Heightened conflict intensity is further evident with the 'U.S. military turned back six ships in first 24 hours of Iranian port blockade,' signaling direct operational challenges and regional tensions. These critical areas, coupled with associated Trade & Supply Chain Stress, are key drivers pushing the overall risk profile upwards.
